query:
SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME
FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('transactions', 'recurring_transactions', 'goals');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 24QshLSqN1EE5J6.eabae9e6e787 --database RQcPXrGoewsa5kXKfjXxsp --execute SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME
FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('transactions', 'recurring_transactions', 'goals');
